detaileddescription.para: weights of observation distributions deduced from the restoration

briefdescription.para: Destruction of the data members of a DiscreteParametricProcess object.
Assignment operator of the DiscreteParametricProcess class.

parameterdescription.para: pointer on the observation frequency distributions,
pointer on the marginal frequency distribution,

pointer on the marginal frequency distribution,

parameterdescription.para: pointer on the observation frequency distributions,
pointer on the marginal frequency distribution,

memberdef.name: plotable_write

parameterdescription.para: pointer on the observation frequency distributions,
pointer on the marginal frequency distribution,

briefdescription.para: Computation of the support of the observation process.
Permutation of observation distributions. The permutation validity should be checked by the calling function.
Computation of the number of free parameters of a discrete parametric observation process.
Computation of the mean of a mixture of discrete parametric observation distributions.
Computation of the variance of a mixture of discrete parametric observation distributions.
Computation of a mixture of discrete parametric observation distributions.

simplesect.para: mixture of discrete parametric observation distributions.

briefdescription.para: Initialization of discrete parametric observation distributions using perturbation.

detaileddescription.para: for (i = 0;i < nb_state;i++) { noise_proba = NOISE_PROBABILITY * nb_state / nb_value;

pmass = observation[i]->mass; for (j = 0;j < i * nb_value / nb_state;j++) { pmass++ -= noise_proba / (nb_state - 1); } for (j = i * nb_value / nb_state;j < (i + 1) * nb_value / nb_state;j++) { pmass++ += noise_proba; } for (j = (i + 1) * nb_value / nb_state;j < nb_value;j++) { pmass++ -= noise_proba / (nb_state - 1); } } }

memberdef.argsstring: (StatError &error, ifstream &in_file, int &line, int nb_state, model_type model, double cumul_threshold=OBSERVATION_THRESHOLD)
memberdef.name: parsing

briefdescription.para: Analysis of the format of discrete parametric observation distributions.

parameterdescription.para: reference on the file line index,
threshold on the cumulative distribution functions.

detaileddescription.para: Collection of univariate discrete parametric emission distributions. In the multivariate case, use a collection of conditionally independent DiscreteParametricProcesses observations[k] is a pointer to emission distribution for state k
